station_unassigned.title: Station Unassigned
station_unassigned.description: This KDS has no kitchen station assigned. Ask a manager to re-assign it from the dashboard under Stations.

empty_state.title: Kitchen Clear
empty_state.description: Waiting for new orders from terminal...

no_kitchen_station.title: No Kitchen Station Assigned
no_kitchen_station.description: Ask an owner to assign a kitchen station to this device in the dashboard under Stations.

settings_popover.title: KDS Settings
settings_popover.hint: Leave empty to always show completed tickets.

ticket.station_done_waiting: Station done — waiting for other stations

toasts.item_not_assigned: This item is not assigned to your station
toasts.recall_failed: Failed to recall item — please try again.
toasts.start_preparing_failed: Failed to start preparing — please try again.
toasts.mark_served_failed: Failed to mark as served — please try again.

empty_state.title: All Clear
empty_state.description: No active orders across all stations

toasts.items_not_ready: Some items are still being prepared.
toasts.invalid_status: Order is not in a confirmable state.
toasts.mark_served_failed: Failed to mark as served — please try again.

error.title: Failed to load station data.
error.description: Check your connection and try again.

pairing_screen.title: Link this device
pairing_screen.subtitle: Ask the business owner to generate a pairing code from the dashboard.

attendance_qr.title: Clock-In QR Code
attendance_qr.description: Staff scan this from the mobile app to clock in, clock out, or take a break. It refreshes automatically every few seconds so a photo of it can't be reused.
attendance_qr.generate_error: Failed to generate QR code. Please try again.
